rationale: The candidate df79ccd895d286bd286b83f7c18eb544c57c84b6 is the only one that correctly preserves the MDX structure and metadata. The 'current' version and the other candidate (f5da03ac5bf11b47b5d67552adf7ee40ef332626) both have broken code blocks in Pattern 1 (the return statement is outside the code block) and duplicate H2 headers for Pattern 2. Gemini-3-flash-preview correctly translated the content while maintaining the integrity of the technical examples and the heading structure.
